title: phase 3 — drafts-inbox + auto-classifier
description:
## Summary
- New `coaching.drafts` table — one row per `(chunk, classifier_version)`; four reviewable kinds (theory/noise bypass).
- `coaching-classifier.ts` (Anthropic Haiku 4.5, Zod-validated 6-kind envelope, one-shot retry) + `task coaching:classify -- <slug>` CLI + opt-in `--classify` flag on `coaching:ingest`.
- `/api/admin/coaching/drafts/*` endpoints: list, detail, accept (with `?then=publish` Skip-Snippet handoff to Phase-2 publish editor), reject. Plus `/books/[id]/acceptance-rate`.
- `/admin/knowledge/drafts` Drafts-Inbox: three-pane UI (filter rail + grouped list + two-column verbatim-chunk-vs-payload detail), three primary actions, mentolder dark theme, <30% acceptance-rate red badge.

The book is **not yet uploaded** — the Inbox renders an empty-state pointing at `task coaching:classify`. End-to-end exercise happens after the first ingest.

Phase 3 of `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-10-coaching-knowledge-design.md`.
Plan: `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-10-coaching-knowledge-phase-3.md`.

## Test plan
- [x] `npx vitest run src/lib/coaching-classifier.test.ts` (9 passed)
- [x] `npx vitest run src/lib/coaching-db.test.ts` (18 passed: 12 prior + 6 new)
- [ ] After merge + deploy: `task website:deploy ENV=mentolder` → visit `/admin/knowledge/drafts` (empty state)
- [ ] After first book ingest: `task coaching:classify -- --slug=<slug>` → re-visit Inbox

## Notes
- Pre-existing TS warnings on `pg.rowCount` strictness in `classify-book.mts` and on `ensureCollection` description type in `ingest-book.mts` — both pre-Phase-3, runtime fine, swept as the codebase evolves.
- Commits `9a15fd86` accidentally bundles Tasks 7+8's files (parallel-agent staging race); content correct, message under-describes.
